description: Declares the ADDITIVE collaborative grants the library collection needs. Read by install-collection Step 5.5 and provisioned via the permission-change-helper skill (admin reviews + Accepts). Never applied by aifs_share directly. {param} placeholders resolve at provisioning from collection-setup-responses.md and org-config.json. This file declares GRANTS only (op:share). Per-document privacy is NOT expressed here — private docs live in their owner's My Drive and are shared by member-applied grants at runtime (set-doc-visibility).

acls.rationale: The public-doc commons. Every member reads any public doc and may collaboratively edit (writes are changelog-attributed). Public doc folders created under here inherit the grant.

The always-org-public catalog (tree.json, per-doc pointers, doc-types.json). Members must append/update pointers to register their own docs and edit the taxonomy, so the index is writable by all. Title-only metadata for private docs lives here by design (decision 5/6).
